hero.title: Grow Your Business with MIRYA
hero.description: Join MIRYA’s certified expert network and turn your automation expertise into trusted, scalable client solutions.

levels.title: Grow Your Expertise with MIRYA
levels.desc: Progress through clearly defined expert levels to gain visibility, credibility, and access to new business opportunities.

card1.title: Registered Expert
card1.description: A low-friction entry point into the MIRYA ecosystem for professionals' collaboration.

card2.title: MIRYA Certified Expert
card2.description: The core certification level for experts delivering services through MIRYA.
requirements: Completion of official MIRYA Expert Training
Certification based on real use cases
Agreement to MIRYA Quality & Delivery Standards.

card3.title: MIRYA Solution Partner
card3.description: Enable partners to scale revenue and act as official MIRYA solution providers.
requirements: Optional multi-person certification within partner team.

partner.title: Why Partner With MIRYA
partner.description: Partnering with MIRYA gives you visibility, qualified demand, and a scalable way to grow your automation business within a trusted ecosystem.

card1.title: Visibility
card1.description: Stand out as a verified MIRYA partner with prominent placement across the Hire an Expert directory, partner pages, and co-marketing initiatives.

card2.title: Qualified Leads
card2.description: Gain access to organization already exploring MIRYA and seeking expert help. Leads are curated, relevant, and aligned with your services—reducing sales friction and accelerating engagement.

card3.title: Training & Certification Revenue
card3.description: Turn your expertise into a revenue stream through paid training, certifications, and enablement services. As partners advance, they unlock additional monetization opportunities tied to education and implementation.

card4.title: Ecosystem Growth
card4.description: Grow alongside MIRYA as the platform expands. Partners benefit from increased product adoption, joint go-to-market activities, and long-term collaboration within a rapidly scaling automation ecosystem.
